briefdescription.para: :param config: configuration of the reader, e.g.

detaileddescription.para: logger for logging :param recognized_extensions: set of supported files extensions with a dot, for example {.doc, .pdf} :param recognized_mimes: set of supported MIME types of files

briefdescription.para: The method return document content with all document's lines and tables, attachments remain empty.

detaileddescription.para: This reader is able to add some additional information to the tag_hierarchy_level of :class:~dedoc.data_structures.LineMetadata. Look to the documentation of :meth:~dedoc.readers.BaseReader.read to get information about the method's parameters.

memberdef.argsstring: (self, Union[Tag] tag, str filepath_hash, bool handle_invisible_table, Optional[bool] table=False, Optional[str] uid="")
memberdef.name: __handle_block

memberdef.argsstring: (self, Tag tag, str filepath_hash, str uid, Optional[bool] table=False)
memberdef.name: __handle_single_tag

memberdef.argsstring: (self, Tag block, str filepath_hash="", bool handle_invisible_table=False, Optional[bool] table=False, Optional[str] uid="")
memberdef.name: __read_blocks

memberdef.argsstring: (self, str line, str line_type, int header_level=0, str uid=None, str filepath_hash=None, List annotations=None)
memberdef.name: __make_line

memberdef.argsstring: (self, Tag lst, str uid, str filepath_hash, bool handle_invisible_table)
memberdef.name: __read_list

memberdef.argsstring: (self, Tag item, int item_index, str list_type, str filepath_hash, str uid, bool handle_invisible_table)
memberdef.name: __handle_list_item

briefdescription.para: check if given tag is a content tag

parameterdescription.para: is invisibly table should be handled as table

simplesect.para: : True if tag is a content tag False otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (self, Tag block, str filepath_hash, str uid)
memberdef.name: __handle_invisible_table

memberdef.argsstring: (self, str block, str filepath_hash, str uid, bool ignore_space=True)
memberdef.name: _handle_text_line

briefdescription.para: This reader allows to handle documents with the following extensions: .htm, .html, .shtml.
